## AI Disclosure

- **Model/Agent used**: <!-- e.g., GitHub Copilot, Claude 3.5 Sonnet, Custom Sub-agent -->
- **Primary Prompt**: <!-- The initial prompt or core instruction used for this change -->

## Code Review Process

<!-- Describe how the AI-generated code was verified. Refer to CLAUDE.md for the 4-stage review pipeline if applicable. -->
- [ ] Stage 1: Parallel Focused Reviewers (Correctness, Security, Performance)
- [ ] Stage 2: Best-of-N Synthesis (for large diffs)
- [ ] Stage 3: De-dup Judge Agent
- [ ] Stage 4: Fix & Verify (incorporating findings)

## Type of Change

<!-- Please pick one or more that are relevant. -->
- **feat**: New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- **fix**: Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- **refactor**: Code change that neither fixes a bug nor adds a feature
- **perf**: Code change that improves performance
- **docs**: Documentation updates
- **breaking**: Change that requires a version bump or breaks existing functionality

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's [CLAUDE.md](CLAUDE.md) style guidelines.
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code.
- [ ] I have added/updated tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works.
- [ ] I have run `bun run lint` and fixed any lint errors.
- [ ] I have updated any relevant documentation ([CLAUDE.md](CLAUDE.md), `README.md`, etc.).
- [ ] I have included a [CODE_REVIEW_GUIDE.md](code_review/) report in the `code_review/` folder (for non-trivial changes).
